templates.title: Uniqlo Sales Alerter (Abbaty Fork)
templates.description: Self-hosted server that watches Uniqlo's sale catalogue against your saved filters and notifies you via Apprise (~80 supported services).

env.name: ALERTER_SECRET
env.label: HMAC secret for signed action URLs
env.description: Leave blank to auto-generate to /app/data/.secret on first run.

env.name: STORE_COUNTRY
env.label: Uniqlo store country
env.description: e.g. nl/nl, de/de, uk/en. See README for full list.
